title: Oblivio3´s admin Commands
description: With this mod you can manage your server.
body:
Adds custom Commands that are usuful and fun.

/gui -> open gui with many Admin Powers (commands on pressing buttons)

/deopall -> deops everyone in the server exept for you

/vanish -> makes you invisible

/fly -> you can fly in survival

/unvanish -> makes you visible again

/banall -> banned everyone

/slowall -> Give everyone slowness exept for people who are in creative or spectator

/killall -> killes everyone exept for people who are in creative or spectator

/clearslow -> clears slowness effect for everyone

/kickall -> kicks everyone exept for people who are in creative or spectator

and 2 new items 1 that stops the server on right klick 

and 1 that is giveing everyone who right klicks it operator
